message:
feat(c_interop): Complete numpy C API compatibility

Export all C symbols numpy.so requires for dlopen loading:

Type objects exported:
- PyLong_Type, PyFloat_Type, PyDict_Type, PyList_Type
- PyBytes_Type, PyComplex_Type, PySet_Type, PyFrozenSet_Type
- PyTuple_Type, PyUnicode_Type, PySlice_Type, PyBool_Type
- PyCFunction_Type, PyCMethod_Type, PyMethod_Type
- PyType_Type, PyBaseObject_Type

Exception types exported (46 total):
- All PyExc_* exceptions now use `pub export var`
- Added PyExc_IOError, PyExc_ImportWarning, PyExc_RuntimeWarning
- Added PyExc_FutureWarning, PyExc_UnboundLocalError

New functions added:
- PyUnicode_AsUCS4, PyUnicode_AsUCS4Copy, PyUnicode_FromKindAndData
- _Py_BuildValue_SizeT, _PyArg_ParseTuple_SizeT
- _PyArg_ParseTupleAndKeywords_SizeT, _PyArg_VaParseTupleAndKeywords_SizeT
- _Py_ascii_whitespace table, _PyErr_BadInternalCall
- _PyObject_CallFunction_SizeT, _PyObject_CallMethod_SizeT
- _PyObject_LookupAttr
- Py_Version, Py_EnterRecursiveCall, Py_LeaveRecursiveCall

Result: 316/316 numpy-required symbols now covered (was 160/316)
Total c_interop exports: 1,685 symbols
